# `input.source`

> **Stability:** stable
> **Since:** 0.4

Build a source-field input descriptor.

## Signature

```ts
source(defaultValue: SourceField, opts?: {
    readonly title?: string;
}): SourceDescriptor {
    return Object.freeze({ kind: "source" as const, defaultValue, ...opts });
}
```

## Example

```ts
const source = input.source("close");
    void source;
```
